home.heroSubtitle: African Echo a Ugandan singer and Songwriter based in Kampala Uganda.
home.aboutText: Born in the heart of East Africa and refined in the digital era, African Echo blends Afrobeats and local beats.
home.bioSubtitle: Born and raised in the heart of Uganda, African Echo is a soulful singer and songwriter whose music serves as a bridge between different communities and societies.

about.tagline: African Echo whose real name is Kimera Adam is a Ugandan singer and Songwriter based in Kampala.
story: Born in the vibrant heart of Kampala, African Echo represents the new wave of Ugandan artistry. His journey began in the eastern Ugandan were he was born before moving to the capital Kampala
His sound blends Afrobeats and dancehall based in Kampala African Echo whose real name is Kimera Adam blends the local and modern beats.
Through his lyrics, Kimera explores themes of identity, brings vibes life in Kampala, and vibes from the Ugandan landscape, to the world showcasing this talent from Uganda.
